name: FeiyuTech Diving Waterproof Case for Pocket 3
description: Feiyutech IPX8 Diving Waterproof Case for Feiyu Pocket 3

features.Key Features:: Compatible with: Feiyu Pocket 3 (Diving mode) | Activities: swimming, surfing, diving, snorkeling, skiing, underwater photography | Protect your Pocket 3 from water, mud, dirt, snow and debris during extreme activities | High-density Sealed, IPX8 Waterproof Level | Highly Transparent Tempered Glass, Worry-free Image Quality | Versatile Expandability: a Gopro adapter mount and a 1/4'' screw hole for more uses
features.What’s in the box?: Feiyutech IPX8 Diving Waterproof Case for Feiyu Pocket 3
